name: Luckless Lucina
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female. Wears a single shirt with suspenders combined with belted braies - the meager clothing of someone living on the streets.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: unfortunate, persistent, humble, destitute, resourceful
Role: Luckless Lucina is a beggar who survives by asking for food and money from the citizens and visitors of Cheydinhal. Despite her dire circumstances, she maintains connections to Cheydinhal's underground and possesses knowledge that proves valuable to those seeking certain opportunities in the city.
Home Location Information: Lucina has no proper home. Her bedroll and food bag can be found behind Willow Bank, against the city wall, where she sleeps outdoors.
Daily Routine: Lucina wakes at 6am and immediately heads to the west gate of the city to beg for food and money. At 10am, she relocates to the plaza in front of the Cheydinhal Mages Guild to continue her appeals. At 2pm, she moves to what she considers a more promising location - in front of The Great Chapel of Arkay - where she begs until 6pm. She then returns to her bedroll to retrieve some food and spends two hours eating dinner. After her meal, she strolls around her bedroll area until going to sleep at 10pm. On rainy days, she seeks shelter under the porch awning at Riverview until the weather clears.
Personality - The Persistent Survivor: Despite her nickname and unfortunate circumstances, Lucina maintains her daily routine with persistence, moving between different locations throughout Cheydinhal in search of charity. She knows the city's rhythms and positions herself strategically - at the gates, the Mages Guild, and the Chapel - to maximize her chances of receiving help. Living on society's margins has given her connections to information that others might not possess, making her more resourceful than her appearance might suggest.
author: Bethesda
